name: KS Assistant
greeting: Hi! I'm KS Bot 👋 Ask me anything about Kishan — skills, projects, experience, education, or how to hire him!
fallback: Hmm, I don't have that info. Try asking about: skills, projects, experience, education, services, hobbies, or contact!

qa.answer: 👨‍💻 I'm Kishan Sondagar — a Web Developer from Gujarat, India. I build responsive websites, handle SEO optimization, and manage web presence. Currently working at Micro System handling Website Management & Digital Marketing (Feb 2026 – Present).

🎓 I completed my BCA (Bachelor of Computer Applications) from Marwadi University, Rajkot (2022–2025) with a solid 7.04 CGPA. My coursework covered programming, web technology, databases, and problem solving.

💻 My Tech Stack:
• Frontend: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript
• Database: MongoDB, Supabase
• Version Control: Git, GitHub
• Deployment: Vercel, Netlify, Render
• SEO: On-page SEO, Metadata, Performance
• Tools: Google Analytics, Search Console

🚀 Real-World Projects:

1️⃣ Micro System Website Redesign — Redesigned microsystem.net.in with a modern UI and complete SEO optimization including local SEO for city pages.

2️⃣ Quick Quotation App — Built a web app for Micro System to generate instant quotations for Stabilizers, Inverters & Online UPS — solving the problem of late-night/weekend customer inquiries.

💼 Work Experience:

Company: Micro System
Role: Website Management & Digital Marketing
Duration: 14 Feb 2026 – Present

Micro System is an electrical company manufacturing and selling Stabilizers, Inverters, and Online UPS units. I handle their entire web presence and digital marketing.

🛠️ Services I Offer:
• Website Development (Business, Portfolio, Landing Pages)
• Frontend Development (HTML/CSS/JS)
• Deployment Setup (Vercel, Netlify, Render)
